items.title: [负面] Good grief, you can't be serious... In the span of...
items.summary:
Good grief, you can't be serious... In the span of ten days, this game screwed me over real bad because it can't handle its own schedule. First, I got ripped off an entire set of weekly goodies thx to this still-persistent wrong timer on the season pass menu, which is a full day behind the actual weekly reset. For days I was second-guessing my own sense of time, wondering if I was the one messing up, only to realize this is a known, unfixed issue. I said "F*ck it. Let's give the devs the benefit of the doubt," even though weeklies are essential and a huge chunk of D-Jewels is locked behind them.

Then came the final straw. The new season launched with awfully, barely communicated server maintenance that started a whole f*cking hour early. Every single event in this game normally ends exactly at daily reset, except this time, when they decided to pull the plug early and completely disregard all ongoing events and time-gated activities. Everything's gone. They didn't give a single flying f*ck about players going through the story, finishing time-limited content, or just casually playing.

50 SP levels, DD, Traphase, and D-Tide rewards - weeks of progress ERASED. And no, "it's just one hour" is not a valid excuse in any universe. If reset is at 10:00, then it's precisely 10:00. Not 9:30. Not even 9:59. Devs, you don't get to move the finish line whenever you feel like it, let alone a whole ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ hour early. Period.

Instead of cluttering the screen with gacha bait, how about a clear, simple maintenance notice like literally every other game manages to do? Or are players expected to dig through a quadrillion Discord messages just to avoid getting robbed? This wasn't poor timing. This was negligence.

Mom, this University sucks ass.
